/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/aula3exemplo.dir/src/aula3exemplo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aula3exemplo.dir/common/glad.c.o -o aula3exemplo  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework OpenGL _deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
